results.title: Hema Malini shares on audience's love for Hindi film tracks: 'Not only Indians, but even foreigners listen to our songs'
results.description: Hema Malini honored her late husband Dharmendra at a concert celebrating her career. The event also recognized Dharmendra's significant contributions to Indian cinema. Malini spoke about the enduring popularity of 1970s and 1980s Hindi film songs. She recently accepted the Padma Vibhushan award posthumously for Dharmendra. Family members attended the emotional tribute to the legendary actor.
